D2_PROBLEM: 부적합 다량 발생으로 인한 공장 개선 활동
D4_SMMY:
Development (Pilot V0000) Nonconformity occurrence - 2 ea of FCB and FMM
At the beginning of mass production, activities to improve the occurrence of large quantities of BKB, BWB, LP, and LS were carried out.
1. BKB improvement activities - Spec aspect: R/C Ga' increased by 0.3, I/L width increased by 10mm 
                                                                  Management aspect: G/T inventory time management
2. LP improvement activities - Spec aspect: I/L Ga' increased 0.9/0.5 → 1.1/0.5
3. Light performance improvement activities - Spec aspect: AVH processing 
                                                                                                Management aspect: priority placement of vacuum vulcanization
D8_RESULT:
1. IQM Score : 11.7 → 13.3 ( 13.68% Improve )
2. Nonconformity 
  - Light : 2,563 → 231 PPM ( 90.99% improve )
  - BKB : 0 → 777 PPM ( No Improvement ) 
  - LP : 1,010 → 499 PPM ( 51% Improve)
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: [BKB] It's long stock time in G/T warehouse (Avg.17.6 hr) -> sagging G/T -> BKB & BWB occur
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: [BKB] G/T inventory time management (<4hr)

D5_COUNTERMEASURE: No Issue

D2_PROBLEM: The shipment from Hungary in time ( 2025 may ) with proper DOT number within the OE limit but on the warehouse ( Sundl to Glovis ) than the tires went older than OE limit and shipped to Gundlach SK than returned to Hungary Plant. So the suspected reason is that the warehouse not managed well the products based on their DOT information.
D0_EMERGENCY: Review background / history of shipment and handle the returned tire.
D4_SMMY: 8D not required , tires are shipped back to Hungary . Sundl WH changed for Hyundai Glovis , the stock is transfered there and the tires became old so HK Mp) delivered in time
D8_RESULT: Tire ship back to Mp) and handled , move to RE location.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: New W/H transfered stock
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: Stock is checked

D0_EMERGENCY: Review the quality and production history.
D4_SMMY: We checked that tire, where much balance weight used in the rim with our Hunter balance M/C in a different rim. On that rim only 35g balance weight needed to be in balanced the complete wheel. Our opinion is that the rim has deformation/balance issue. Possible at that speed range cause the humming.
D8_RESULT: Rejected by HK due to the wheel issue caused.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: We checked that tire, where much balance weight used in the rim with our Hunter balance M/C in a different rim. On that rim only 35g balance weight needed to be in balanced the complete wheel. Our opinion is that the rim has deformation/balance issue. Possible at that speed range cause the humming.
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: Also need to point out that all claimed tires fitted to the rim within TUZ (calculation use the radial force variation, first harmonic, radial and lateral runout values) tolerance is also an evidence for that, there were no any issue at fitting company too.

D8_RESULT: 8D implemented to customer and Human Error caused with education reinforcement.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: This tire was inspected by the operator you can see above. Like it was said before, this type of faults have to be detected by the visual inspector. This is a human error caused non detection.
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: requested the Quality Assurance team for an OPL for their operators.

D2_PROBLEM:
1. China Halla 로부터 세 가지 유형의 이슈 접수
    - 비드부 식출
    - 바코드 일부가 고무에 덮힘
    - Red dot 마킹 품도
2. 비드부 식출 이슈의 경우, 거의 매달 발생
D0_EMERGENCY: 1. 세 가지 이슈에 대해 유관 부서에 개선 방안 요청
D4_SMMY:
1. 비드부 식출
    - 트리밍 과정에서 식출 고무가 완전히 제거되지 않아 발생한 이슈
    - 가류기의 Green tire 변형 방지 세팅을 항시 On 설정하여 비드부 식출 최소화
2.  바코드 일부가 고무에 덮임
    - Serial barcode 일부가 고무에 덮여 Halla 인라인에서 바코드가 미인식된 이슈
    - 가류기 Loader shoe 날개 부위와 Green tire 안착 세팅 점검하여 고무에 의한 바코드 간섭 최소화
3. Red dot 마킹 품도
    - 널링부 마킹이 선명하지 않거나 일부 지워져 Halla 인라인 비전 장비에 red dot 마킹이 미인식된 이슈
    - Red dot 마킹이 널링부에 되지 않도록 마킹 위치 세팅을 조정
D8_RESULT:
비드부 식출, 바코드 미인식, Red dot 품도, 해당 세 가지 이슈에 대한 대책서 송부 후 테슬라로부터 피드백은 없는 상태.
비드부 식출 및 Red dot 이슈는 지속적으로 발생되는 이슈로, 대책 이행 여부에 대한 모니터링 및 추가 개선 포인트 확인 필요.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: 2. 바코드 일부가 고무에 덮임 : OP가 바코드 수동 부착 시 위치가 틀어짐
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: 가류공정에서 해당 규격 교체 시 가류기 Loader shoe 날개부위와 Green tire 안착 세팅 점검하여 바코드 간섭 최소화

1. China Anyi RDC 재고 756ea 중 IG 부적합 선별하여 문제없음 확인
2. 3/6일 기준,  KP에서 중국 Anyi RDC로 운송 중인 물량이 737ea임을 확인 (컨테이너 1개 분량 수준)
D4_SMMY:
1. Improvement and optimization of the curing machine loader gripper
    - To prevent the G/T from falling, we optimized the setting of the loader gripper.
    - Regular accuracy inspection will be carried out on the loader gripper.
2. Establishment of response procedure for G/T falls from the curing machine loader
    -  When the G/T falls from the curing machine loader, the curing machine stops automatically.
    - The operator repositions the G/T to its correct position.
    - Ensure 100% scanning and matching of the curing machine barcode and the G/T barcode.
        (Since the G/T barcode must be located on the upper side to be scanned, inverse Green Tire can be prevented)
    - The curing machine is re-operated.
3. Improvement for IG detection device 
    - Retraining and applying the detection model (V8 → V26) for nine KP IG inspection devices
D8_RESULT:
Need a follow‑up to confirm whether a barcode scan is performed when tires are manually loaded in the curing process.
Need a follow-up to confirm whether the IG detection device is being properly operated and whether its detection accuracy is satisfactory.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: 1. The calibration of the IG inspection device was incorrect, so it judged NG as OK and failed to detect the IG.
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: 1. Retraining and applying the detection model (V8 → V26) for nine KP IG inspection devices

    - 이슈 타이어 : Outside에 DOT, Serial Barcode, 색선 / Inside에 Red-dot 
2. 이슈 타이어 Serial Barcode : 1658676759
D0_EMERGENCY:
1. China Anyi RDC 재고 756ea 중 IG 부적합 선별하여 문제없음 확인
2. 3/6일 기준,  KP에서 중국 Anyi RDC로 운송 중인 물량이 737ea임을 확인 (컨테이너 1개 분량 수준)
D4_SMMY:
1. Improvement and optimization of the curing machine loader gripper
    - To prevent the G/T from falling, we optimized the setting of the loader gripper.
    - Regular accuracy inspection will be carried out on the loader gripper.
2. Establishment of response procedure for G/T falls from the curing machine loader
    -  When the G/T falls from the curing machine loader, the curing machine stops automatically.
    - The operator repositions the G/T to its correct position.
    - Ensure 100% scanning and matching of the curing machine barcode and the G/T barcode.
        (Since the G/T barcode must be located on the upper side to be scanned, inverse Green Tire can be prevented)
    - The curing machine is re-operated.
3. Improvement for IG detection device 
    - Retraining and applying the detection model (V8 → V26) for nine KP IG inspection devices
D8_RESULT:
Need a follow‑up to confirm whether a barcode scan is performed when tires are manually loaded in the curing process.
Need a follow-up to confirm whether the IG detection device is being properly operated and whether its detection accuracy is satisfactory.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: 1. Due to a trouble in the curing machine loader, the G/T fell and flipped over
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: 2. Establishment of response procedure for G/T falls from the curing machine loader.

 - 전륜 좌&우 타이어 총 2개 파손
 - Belt sepa. 양상
2) 사고품은 동일 시험 재사용 타이어로, 시험준비 및 과정이 일반적이지 않았던 history 확인됨.
  - '25년 7월에 2주간(24hr*14days) 1차 시험용 진행 후, 약 5개월 외부 방치
  - '26년 1월에 동일 시험을 위해 방치된 타이어 재사용. 브레이크 교체 후 캘리브레이션 과정에서 타이어 파손 발생. 좌우 동시 파손.
       (속도 50kph, 소요시간 5분, 축하중 6ton, 공기압 미체크, 제동 및 조향 미적용)
D0_EMERGENCY: HMC 요청에 따라 고품 회수 후 개발팀,내구성능평가팀,기술검증팀과 분석 예정.
D4_SMMY:
1) 시험 준비 및 과정에서의 이슈 요인 잠재
 - 2주(24hr*14days) roll test 후 5개월 동안 외부 방치한 타이어 재사용
 - Test 시 공기압 미측정으로 인해 정격 범위 내 시험 진행되었는지 확인 불가

2) 타이어 품질 이상없음
 - 법규내구 결과 합격수준

D4_ROOT_CAUSE: OEM 테스트 타이어 가혹 사용에 따른 이슈발생 추정 (2주간 roll test 후 5개월 간 외부 방치한 타이어 재사용)

D2_PROBLEM:
Very lite marking of Red Dot causing downtime to Tire & Wheel line. 
Multiple tires with this condition. 
(100 tires were sorted / OK : 79 / NG : 21)
D0_EMERGENCY:
Hankook conducted a comprehensive inspection at the Geumsan plant today.(7th Jan, 2026)
During the loading process of 410 tires into container #SMCU1179273, Hankook performed a 100% manual inspection. 
Tires DOT 5225, and no instances of missing or poor visibility red dots were found.
Based on these results, Hankook have determined that there are no further occurrences of this issue within this shipment.
D4_SMMY:
1. Red Dot Marker : Hankook insure that Uniformity process and Marking tape is not changed.(Does not think this is the root cause)
2. Hankook discovered that provided barcode tires followed a different logistical route than usual. 
   - Standard Route: Geumsan Plant (KR) ➔ Container Loading ➔ Sterling Heights, MI (Direct) ➔ Hearns ➔ DDMP 
   - Issue Route     : Geumsan Plant (KR) ➔ Container Loading ➔ LA Warehouse (Intermediate Stop) ➔ Sterling Heights, MI➔ Hearns ➔  DDMP
  (1) Why stopped at the LA Warehouse ? 
     - Before start 25% tax increase, Hankook decided to send them to the US. (Detroit warehouse was already full)
  (2) Main difference between standard vs intermediate route is extra handling and Loading method
      - Standard route from LA to MI : horizontal loading
      - Intermediate route LA to MI :  Loose lace loading

3. Root Cause : 2 weeks Loose lace loaded tire container traveling from the LA warehouse to the Sterling Heights, MI Warehouse
    could have caused some red dot rubbed off issue by compressive force on the red dot. 
   - Vibrations, with high localized pressure, could cause friction that exceeds the marking’s physical durability. 

1. Hankook will block the use of the different route, and to use the different route, it needs to be approved by Quality. 
      Also, Hankook Quality will communicate with FORD STA and get SREA approval. 
2. Hankook will perform the incoming/shipping inspection at the warehouse. 
3. Standardization of loading method and operator training.
D8_RESULT: Need to follow up improvement activities such as detecting system. also discuss with CER and Ford to stop the sorting work.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: 2 weeks Loose lace loaded tire container traveling from the LA warehouse to the Sterling Heights, MI Warehouse     could have caused some red dot rubbed off issue by compressive force on the red dot.
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: Hankook will block the use of the different route, and to use the different route, it needs to be approved by Quality.        Also, Hankook Quality will communicate with FORD STA and get SREA approval.

D2_PROBLEM: 青岛一汽大众刘工反馈，我司供货的Bora 规格225/45R17H K127 CD（1027785）售后投诉1本轮胎胎面2处异常，已录入大众系统，里程数1471km。一汽大众反馈之前还有一例，德州的，目前来看是批量性的，事态严重性已升级、
D0_EMERGENCY:
1.轮胎返回后制造过程追溯
2.安全性验证
3.外观分析
4.断面切割
5.根本原因分析
6.再现试验
7.改善对策树立实施
D4_SMMY: P27橡胶内 A1012 OMS中碳化颗粒，行驶中硬物剥离.
D8_RESULT:
1.胎面异物，经过硫化，异物表层覆盖橡胶，外观检查不易发现，导致最终流出。
FM on the T/D, after Curing, are covered with rubber, making them difficult to detect during external inspections, leading to eventual leakage.
2.对内，根本原因为P27橡胶使用OMS设备，容易产生碎胶，导致焦烧发生，属于设备短板。后续将增加设备清扫频次来改善焦烧发生。我们将会持续开展FM改善活动，来减少issue发生。
Internally,the root cause has been confirme. P27 is produced using OMS mixing equipment, resulting in a lot of broken rubber that leads to burning, which is unavoidable. This should be considered a drawback of the equipment.Subsequently, the frequency of equipment cleaning will be increased to improve the occurrence of burning.And we will continue to conduct FM improvement activities to reduce the occurrence of issues.
3.对外，根本原因为生胎落地，导致石头粘连，我们进行了再现试验，样像一致。
Externally, our root cause was due to the G/T landing, causing the stones to stick together.we use a replica of the issue to illustrate that this FM is a stone.
4.Attachments are external analysis reports.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: P27橡胶内 A1012 OMS中碳化颗粒
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: 1次/月清扫改为 1次/班清扫 OMS机台

D2_PROBLEM: Outdated tires arrived to Ford
D0_EMERGENCY:
Write the initial 8D report and upload it to the GSAR system within 24 hours；
HP QA team investigates the historical list of tires sent to third-party warehouses.
D4_SMMY: Due to an operator error, some old DOT inventory that did not comply with the guideline were mixed and shipped.
D8_RESULT:
Containment actions were implemented; FIFO/DOT guidelines were redistributed and mandatory operator training completed with responsibilities clarified, 
and execution will be strengthened with the responsible team to prevent recurrence.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: • At the manufacturing plant (HP), only tires produced within 6 months are controlled and shipped. • HK has guidelines for DOT management within 10 months when shipping to Ford. • Due to an operator error, some old DOT inventory that did not comply with the guideline were mixed and shipped.
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: • Implement mandatory operator training and clarify responsibility to prevent mixing of non-compliant DOT inventory  during the shipping process.

D2_PROBLEM:
The Phenomenon is same at the all Tires, only the shape is different Looks like some cord was cured into the Tire and come out.Claimed tires barcodes fom Schedl: /2775352752 , 2775352751 ,
2775352731/
Tires from the same mold /tool/, and close to each other by curing production sequence. /september 12. production date and Mold No.
Initial tire Inspection /camera photo evidence/ can identify start and clean point.
Hankook tire hereby declare that, the 5A55C54 - part number tire, what is the product code for tires of BMW I20, in size of 275/40R22Y XL IK01 EW (HK Part No. : 1031874) regarding the defect, tire bead scratch (Production DOT 3625 from curing mold 24AG9) : If the nonconform affected tire assembled to a vehicle, the Customer will
realise slow air leakage, whats finaly make a deflated tire, whats can easily realised. Those tires what has not visible scratch mark at the bead area can considered as OK product what has no affect for final Customer.
D0_EMERGENCY: identify clean point for lock
D4_SMMY: Steel sponge caused FM and system has no detection failure. For all categories actions implemented.
D8_RESULT:
2025.11.04. - Immediately block all 3625 DOT tires at Rudolp warehouse. Review by Hankook Sales, this act not cause disturbance at the supply chain.
Blacklist shared with Rudolph WH, they search for tires by barcode: 13 ea found. * Details on the attached file.
No risk identified, the continous supply ensured with later DOT tires. /3725 and later/
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: Steel Sponge cord strucked between the mold and curing machine clamp ring. Steel sponge used for cleaning the molds sidewall before production application. All kind of contamination issue what can affect the tire production should excluded.
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: Prohibited steel sponge usage.

D2_PROBLEM: Foam delamination from end user after ~200 miles.
D0_EMERGENCY: Check current TP stock for DOT 3825 to quarantine potential issues. No stock remaining for issue DOT.
D4_SMMY: Foam machine will be set up to reject tires with excessive glue open time (time between the end of glue application and start of foam application).
D8_RESULT: Need to manage time between glue application and foam application to ensure good adhesion and prevent foam separation.

D5_COUNTERMEASURE: Change machine setting to automatically reject tires after 180 seconds.

D2_PROBLEM: 青岛富维装胎厂反馈主检超差过多，每日下载超40件，不良率5%，车间抱怨很大，造成了生产浪费。要求我司及时派人协助挑选处理，同时公司内部进行管控。
D0_EMERGENCY:
1）. 11月6日~7日中国OE品质，U/F U人员出差现场调查发生原因。
2）. QA人员出差，协助富维装胎厂员工处理超克轮胎再使用作业。
D4_SMMY:
外部因素：
1.T-Roc车型 原价节俭，气门嘴变更，芯片款（26.7g） → 普通款（9.0g），但轮辋未调整，车轮厂认可轮辋异常点存在。
2.轮胎自动仓库，随机位置轮辋手动装配气嘴，位置固定，总成 不进行对点，也是超克的重要原因之一。
内部因素：
1.通过对A-SUV PA 19寸超克条形码分析发现，内部整体水准偏高，合格率也波动比较大，压延工程CP低，进行改善。实施日期：DOT 4625。
D8_RESULT:
外部因素：
1.T-Roc车型 原价节俭，气门嘴变更，芯片款（26.7g） → 普通款（9.0g），但轮辋未调整，车轮厂认可轮辋异常点存在。
2.轮胎自动仓库，随机位置轮辋手动装配气嘴，位置固定，总成 不进行对点，也是超克的重要原因之一。
内部因素：
1.通过对A-SUV PA 19寸超克条形码分析发现，内部整体水准偏高，合格率也波动比较大，压延工程CP低，进行改善。实施日期：DOT 4625。
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: 压延机E3001设备CP低,2# Roll 圆周精度测试NG，对D/B稳定性有影响。
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: #2Roll DS侧 碗状轴承交替，提升压延精度

D2_PROBLEM: According to the feedback from the Portuguese tire factory, a tire of specification 235/45R18 94W K127 was mixed into the VW tires of specification 225/45R 92W K137 sent to Europe
D0_EMERGENCY: Set up tire loading racks in the re-inspection area for isolation to prevent substandard tires from being mixed in.
D4_SMMY:
1、Set up tire loading racks in the re-inspection area for isolation to prevent substandard tires from being mixed in.
2、Strengthen the inspection of tire scanning and loading, and handle the situations where scanning alarms occur in a timely manner. Further prevent the occurrence of mixed tire loading
D8_RESULT:
1、The isolation measures for incorrect shipment specifications were flawed, allowing one incorrect specification tire to be mixed into the shipment.
2、Ensure the strictly implementation of the registered corrective actions and enhance employee skills training to prevent a recurrence of the incident.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: A tire of incorrect specification was placed in a specific and determined area. Due to improper placement, one tire rolled to the loading port at the exit of the station, resulting in the wrong specification of tire being installed.
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: Set up tire loading racks in the re-inspection area for isolation to prevent substandard tires from being mixed in.

D2_PROBLEM: During the factory inspection of the vehicle, it was found that when making a maximum left turn at a speed of 15km/h, the tires would make noise when the inside became wet.
D0_EMERGENCY: HK internal traceability of production process.
D8_RESULT:
1.无水状态下,轮胎轮钢接触面发生干摩擦,处于相对稳定的状态;
2.当有结合面水介入后,由于水的润滑作用,降低了静摩擦力,接触面更容易发生微小的滑动,但当滑动到一定程度局部的水膜破坏接触点突然失去润滑,摩擦力瞬增大 ,将轮胎”粘住”滑动停止,由此产生了周期性的滑动粘住再动一再粘住的过程就是粘滑现象；
3.最常见的表现是在低速转弯时,听到“咯噔"或“嘎吱”一声响,这是因为粘滑现象积累的能量突然释放,导致轮胎胎唇与轮辋发生瞬间的、跳跃式的相对运动。
4.Bead处与轮辋结合处花纹增加改善促进
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: 粘滑现象，引起异响
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: 辊花追加

D2_PROBLEM: Porsche test tires at TÜV SÜD for RR and claimed that the value out of tolerance and / or on the borderline.
D0_EMERGENCY:
Check the suspected LOT and our HK internal RR measuring data and reporting to Porsche.
Re-production and test in MP vs TÜV SÜD by HK.
D4_SMMY: - Mass production specification need to be improved. RR improved tires results are ok. After MP)Technology Team 4M change done possible to use tuned specification.
D8_RESULT: RR improved. Mass spec will be change 4M.

D2_PROBLEM: The tyre was contaminated with dirt. Some of them even have some red paint dust, wood chips and other plastic labels.
D0_EMERGENCY: Classify and clean up contaminated tires to ensure the smooth progress of OEM production
D4_SMMY: First of all, clean the contaminated tires to ensure the smooth progress of OEM production. Secondly, strengthen the management of tires in the transfer warehouse and the inspection of the cleanliness of the containers loaded with tires to prevent the recurrence of tire contamination
D8_RESULT:
1、The root cause was the insufficient supervision of the cleanliness of the transport containers, which led to the incident.
2、To ensure the implemented corrective actions are enforced to prevent such incidents from recurring.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: There are deficiencies in the management of transshipment tires at the Spanish transshipment factory warehouse. The training of loading personnel in work skills is insufficient, and the inspection frequency of the cleanliness of loading containers is not high enough
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: The trailers of the transportation company must meet the cleanliness conditions. Strengthen the inspection of trailers before loading. We are assisting with additional cleaning. It is planned to provide plastic protective layers for these barges as temporary protective measures.

D4_SMMY:
Diffuse Sidewall undulation (Wavy sidewall)
 - Slight radial bulge on sidewall of tire, usually from shoulder to bead that follows the tread aspect.
 - Too much pressure when pressing the sidewall with the finger roll method.
 - Issue is only cosmetically and does not affect the safety of the tires.
D8_RESULT: In the case of a wave side, issues that occur during manufacturing with the finger roll method are only related to appearance and do not affect tire safety, so they are not considered issues. Since there has been no further feedback from DTNA after the issue was raised, this matter is considered closed.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: sidewall with the finger roll method

D2_PROBLEM:
工单号:JZ257362137381464
联系人:薛玉坤
车辆属性:零售车
车型:YU7
行驶里程:5588KM
VIN:HXML2A04XSA171256
制造日期:
交付日期:2025-07-16 09:43:47
门店:小米汽车山东省潍坊市奎文区潍州路服务中心
案例信息:
主题:右前轮胎静音棉脱
故障日期:2025-08-21-2025-08-24
故障频率:持续
故障分类:产品-底盘-轮胎-轮胎相关建议
客户描述:车辆行驶时方向盘抖动
故障分析:轮胎动平衡确认右前轮胎数据异常，内侧140 外侧105数据偏差过大。
检查轮胎外观无磕碰 补胎 轮圈无变形情况。
拔下轮胎发现隔音棉与轮胎内壁脱落。
D0_EMERGENCY: 待返回后分析
D4_SMMY: 脱落时更换处理
D8_RESULT:
市场应对案
1>.更换对象：脱落时更换处理
2>.小米汽车门店有备货方案邀请小米针对销量较多门店或大型城市所在地门店适量备货，以便在静音绵脱落后及时为客户更换
3>.小米汽车门店无备货方案：
①.为快速解决小米汽车静音绵脱落抱怨，计划邀请全国部分大型城市所在地代理商对小米汽车配套轮胎予以备货；②.初步选定在广州、杭州、北京、上海、昆明、成都、南京、沈阳、郑州、武汉等大型城市；③.以上大型城市涵盖周别多个地区，所在城市当天送达小米门店，周边城市基本可以做到新胎次日到达小米门店
改善案：
1>.海绵的压陷硬度取样方法优化并管理基准加严
2>.静音绵贴附工艺优化：胶水量+压合距离+胶头宽度+压合时间
3>.轮胎出库前增加静音绵外观检查，防止静音绵损伤发生
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: 为静音绵自身硬度偏高（515/529批次绵），在行驶过程中受到撞击等外力的诱 因下，导致轮胎静音绵发生脱落
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: 盘库515/529批次绵轮胎，禁止出库，已销售部分当市场发生时更换处理

D2_PROBLEM: Tire has founded with Bulge issue on an exported car before selling.
D0_EMERGENCY: Tire replaced and returned tire cut showed is not opened joint. So internally need investigation by QC and QA Team. Lot Tracking QC and check QA.
D4_SMMY: There was no BPS measurement on the U/F machine due to a shortage of spare parts. With the approval of the QA Team manager and the OE Team manager, we were given permission to inspect low-risk sizes without run out on the machine. In my opinion, the defect is not related with bulge issue. If we had measured the BPS, the laser would not have noticed the error either, because the laser measure on the shoulder part.
D8_RESULT: Mp) Quality Control Team & Hungary QA Team analyzis report attached before.  NCF is not exactly BPS more exactly Foreign material. No found any remained FM sample between the layers. Visible the layers are not cured to each others, separated. This phenomenon similar when any liquid ( oil or hansol or any touch ) occured on the semi material layers. So possible outcome any liquid remained on the surface and cause separation between layers without clear cured rubber and with air pocket.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: Further investigations are needed on the previous process to determine the cause of the error.
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: The run out was installed at 05.30, so the machine already has BPS measurement.

4. 발생 현상 : Bulge
5. 발생 수량 : 1ea
D0_EMERGENCY: 이슈 접수 후 고품 회수하여 단면 형상 확인 예정
D4_SMMY: 성형 공정 작업자가 #1 카카스 조인트 작업 시 하측 조인트 육안 확인 미흡으로 카카스 코드가 Open됨
D8_RESULT:
1. 고품 회수 후 단면 분석과 샘플 타이어를 통해 재현 분석한 결과, 성형공정에서 #1 카카스 조인트 육안 확인 미흡으로 카카스 Open 발생
    - 최초 U/F 검사 data 확인 시 BPS 측정 결과는 OK로 확인됨
2. 재료 교체원과 성형 작업자 대상으로 교육 진행 완료
3. 해당 규격에 대해 U/F설비 측정 압력과 Bulge NG 기준 강화 완료
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: 성형 공정 시 #1 C/C Joint 육안 확인 미흡
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: ① 성형 작업자 One Point Lesson 교육 진행  ② 재료 연결부 Joint 상태 확인 (재료 교체원)  ③ 재료 Joint 상태 재확인 (성형 작업자)

D2_PROBLEM: Nut cure inside the tire, appear on sidewall area. Defect : FMI (Foreign Material Iron).
D0_EMERGENCY:
- Sorting in Renault warehouse, and their car process.
- Hankook Indonesia re-inspect stock with same lot production.
- Waiting ship back tire from Renault -> IP, expect received:  27 Jun.
- QC will detail analysis after receiving actual tire.
D4_SMMY: FMI cause by nut drop in the floor and attach in S/W GT
D8_RESULT:
1) 1 EA abnormality on curing caused of NUT of G/T loader drop and attached the foreign material (NUT).
2) Overall tire stock with same lot production already re-inspected (remain 52 EA in W/H) and not found any defect.
     On Renault warehouse total 7,200 re-inspected by 3rd party.
3) To prevent this issue, in Curing process must control also periodic patrol for foreign material.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: Nut drop in the floor attach in GT when GT fall from loader
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: Patrol daily every shift end for FM in Curing MC area

D2_PROBLEM:
1) 이슈사항 : 몰드 접합 불량에 따른 타이어 Inside방향 MK부적합 발생
2) 규격 : 235/55R19V K127A (Nissan X-trail)
3) OE정보 : 일본 Nissan 후쿠오카 plant로 타이어 공급
4) Suspect range : 360개
     - 일본 후쿠오카 RDC로 12개 컨테이너에 나누어 이동 배송 中
     - 현재까지 OE 공급되지 않았으며, 6/9기준 4개 컨테이너 RDC 도착
D0_EMERGENCY:
1) 6/9 : KP품질관리 & QA팀 품질본부 최초보고, 일본 OE Office와 긴급 미팅 진행
2) 6/10 : 일본 OE Office 엔지니어 2명 긴급 후쿠오카 RDC방문, 전수검사 진행
     - 4개 컨테이너 2,112개중 23M67몰드 261개 소팅 / cut 부적합 23M68몰드 265개 선별
     - 창고 관리업체 주관, 향후 입고되는 컨테이너 물량에 대한 전수 검사 및 소팅 하도록 교육 및 협조요청
3) 6/16 : 6개 컨테이너 누적 총 3,168개중 23M67몰드 374개 소팅 / cut 부적합 23M68몰드 400개 선별
4) 부적합 분석
     - 가류간 몰드 접합이상으로 금속 식출 생성, 금속 식출 생성부위에서 MK부적합 발생(간헐적)
     - 내구검증결과 문제 없으나, 외관 부적합에 따라 OE에서 이슈제기 가능성 높아 창고 소팅 전수 진행
5) 최종확인
     - 최종 선별품 : 1,138개 (23M67 : 668ea / 23M68 : 470ea)
     - 최종 선별품은 일본 OE창고에서 군마창고로 이동, RE판매 전환 예정
     - 일본법인 주관으로 최종 재선별 진행예정이며, Scrap, 선별 및 운송 발생 비용은 G.OE품질팀에서 처리
D4_SMMY:
원인 공정 : 가류
Root-cause : 가류 체부력이 140Ton으로 가압인 상태로 가류 진행 (115±15)
D8_RESULT:
- Mold 체부력 과다에 따른 발생
- 변형부위는 사포로 grinding 조치 완료, 향후 가류초회시 체부력 상태 확인후 기록 진행
- 일본으로 운송 / 식별된 타이어는 RE판매로 전환 조치하되, 일본법인에서 최종 검수하여 scrap 판정예정
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: 가류 체부력이 140Ton으로 가압인 상태로 가류 진행 (115±15)
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: 몰드 Side부 사포로 제거, 가류기 체부력 140Ton→115Ton 조정 (6/2일完) / 가류초회시 체부력 확인후 항목 추가 및 기록관리

D2_PROBLEM: FAW-VW reports that 29 unsold Magotan B8L new cars have been found to have cracked tires
D0_EMERGENCY: Return analysis after tire replacement
D4_SMMY:
On the side of the groove crack, HK tires are significantly more susceptible to cracking compared to GY.
 - Compared to GY, HK tires have significantly lower wax content (0.05% in new tires, 0% in aged tires).
 - The indoor groove crack evaluation results differ from the cold crack occurrence patterns observed in aged products.
2) Lateral Groove Cold Crack test method will be developed and further validated.
D8_RESULT:
On the side of the groove crack, HK tires are significantly more susceptible to cracking compared to GY.
 - Compared to GY, HK tires have significantly lower wax content (0.05% in new tires, 0% in aged tires).
 - The indoor groove crack evaluation results differ from the cold crack occurrence patterns observed in aged products.
2) Lateral Groove Cold Crack test method will be developed and further validated.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: While GY maintains a similar level up to 25℃ and 0℃, HK (P37) begins to deform starting at 0℃.

D8_RESULT:
On the side of the groove crack, HK tires are significantly more susceptible to cracking compared to GY.
 - Compared to GY, HK tires have significantly lower wax content (0.05% in new tires, 0% in aged tires).
 - The indoor groove crack evaluation results differ from the cold crack occurrence patterns observed in aged products.
2) Lateral Groove Cold Crack test method will be developed and further validated.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: Wax content is significantly lower than the P37 Comp'd Spec value
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: Wax content is currently being rechecked (MEP); if no abnormalities are found, it will be necessary to                request the Quality Team to investigate any potential process-related anomalies.

D2_PROBLEM: 接北汽装胎厂（镇江海纳川反馈），我司轮胎打点反向，要求我司查找原因，并跟线处理
D0_EMERGENCY:
1.安排人员跟线处理
2.现场发生原因排查
D4_SMMY:
1.发生原因：查视频后，发现轮胎检查后，反转动作异常，均发生2次翻转，导致打点位置反向，现场与设备共同分析后，根本原因为翻转装置接触感应器松动，误感应，导致2次翻转发生
2.流出原因：出库检查时，仅针对UF/DB点的完整度检查，未检查方向
D8_RESULT:
1.发生原因：查视频后，发现轮胎检查后，反转动作异常，均发生2次翻转，导致打点位置反向，现场与设备共同分析后，根本原因为翻转装置接触感应器松动，误感应，导致2次翻转发生
   改善对策：1>.设备改善：更换气缸感应器
                         2>.程序优化1：轮胎翻转后，设备保持2S，2S内发生翻转，设备报警
                         3>.程序优化2：单本轮胎 发生2次 翻转时，设备报警停机
2.流出原因：出库检查时，仅针对UF/DB点的完整度检查，未检查方向
   改善对策：作业指导书制作，增加专人确认管理
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: 出库检查时，针对UF点，仅检查完整性
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: 1.专门作业指导书制作，现场专人检查实施

D5_COUNTERMEASURE: Inspection prepared the OPL and educate the inspectors.

D4_ROOT_CAUSE: Laser setting U/F
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: 2 point laser middle of S/W and Shoulder part.

D2_PROBLEM: Based on the delivery note 19382 Grossmehrig shipped out only 245/40 R19 ( 150 pcs) but actual shipment result are 1 tire of 255/40R19 and 149 tires 245/40R19. ( Coming from Rudolph warehouse)
D0_EMERGENCY: Investigate where the problem caused, double check barcodes from delivery not 19382 and set up improvement plan. BMW has already requested outbound scanner.
D4_SMMY:
Even with outbound scanning, Rudolph is currently only storing the 10-digit barcode in their system without linking it to related information (such as M-CODE/DOT). Therefore, the root cause seems to lie not in outbound scanning but in the failure to utilize information beyond the 10-digit barcode.Even if outbound scanning had been performed, it would not have been able to detect the issue.

Additionally, and obviously, the issue was also caused by incorrect shipping from the factory. As you know, this can be verified within our system. However, there is a concern that the factory's shipping error might be overlooked entirely in this case.

We are currently discussing with Rudolph about establishing an interface to exchange additional information linked to the barcode. This matter is being handled by the EUR IT Team.
EUR IT Team check the Rudolph file format and adjust than develop interface in SAP program it will automatically send the  informations automatically for the tires. wk5
D8_RESULT:
Entire Global BMW supply chain need to improve Barcode scanning ( interim & long term ) not only German W/H including EU, NA, China & Korea additionaly.
Rudolph warehouse will be audited 5th or 6th February.  EUR IT improvement interface SAP program wk5. Progress be F/U.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: R W/H handle only 10 digit information about the products.
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: SAP interface with auto data sending in order to handle product more acuurately.

D2_PROBLEM: VW Radsystem Mosel claim one tire with chalked marked NCF shipped out to mounting company. Barcode : 2796619448. 8D report not required by customer, compensation need.
D0_EMERGENCY: Tracking history analyze reason building up preventive improvement plan
D4_SMMY: An improperly repaired tire was not separated.
D8_RESULT: For OE shipments are really necessary to have visual inspection when tire loading to cargo. Otherhand the visual inspection need to be more accurate at each inspection gates ( 1 : visual after curing, 2: visual before shipping. Tires were marked with chalk but shipped to customer ( last year occured same issue ). Need to reinforce the detectability of the visual inspection and keep the workmethod rules by inspection area.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: This tire was not inspected by shipping inspector on the shipping side.
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: All OE shipments must be inspected on the shipping site. Education material preparation about the tire handling.

D4_ROOT_CAUSE: The visual inspector did not detect the LS.

D2_PROBLEM:
-Tread Burst on the front tires of a vehicle.
-An issue caused by a tread burst on the front wheels of the vehicle.
-The issued vehicle was manufactured in Mexico and sold to the United States.
-The issued vehicles are for long-haul and the affected tires are for residual use.
-A total of 5 vehicle issues have been reported, but up to 150 tires could be replaced.
D0_EMERGENCY: -Visit fleet and explain the difference between tires and vehicles usage.
D4_SMMY:
Fleet (Standard Logistics Transportation) does not manages or controls the inflation pressure. 
NA)Technical Service team have checked  the fleet and found most of branches maintain air inflation pressure of below 95 psi eventhough recommended pressure is 105psi. (Placard written as 110psi)
Fleet still do not respond to HK and do not share the opposite part of issued. 
No feedback from International nor Fleet about 1 and half month, this issue will be closed.
D8_RESULT:
1.     Conclusion : This issue will be closed and if issue rise again, this to be uploaded again.
2.     Current Status : Jamie Bailey from Standard Logistics was dismissed from company. (It is assumed that Standard Logistics dismissed Key person as management risk / No additional update given to HK)
3.     When NA Technical service team visited Standard Logistics Transportation, all fleet manages air pressure with range of 80~90psi even though 105~110 is recommended.
4.     Standard Logistics Transportation do not share the opposite tire of burst.
5.     This is the reason of closing and telling not HK issue.

D2_PROBLEM: We have received a complain from the Qingdao FAW-VW. During the inspection of a new Audi A3 PA  in 4S shop, 3 tires were found G.C.
D0_EMERGENCY:
1.Basic analysis will be conducted in China, and 2 return tires will be sent to  Korea for further analysis.
2.The analysis plan was sent to FAW-VW on the morning of Dec,17th.
D4_SMMY: Through the analysis of the mechanism of crack formation and the vehicle storage environment, it is possible that the tire was subjected to external abnormal stress, resulting in stress cracks. Under the combined effects of several unfavorable conditions such as high temperature in summer and long-term stationary parking, the degree of stress cracks was exacerbated.
D8_RESULT: Through the analysis of the mechanism of crack formation and the vehicle storage environment, it is possible that the tire was subjected to external abnormal stress, resulting in stress cracks. Under the combined effects of several unfavorable conditions such as high temperature in summer and long-term stationary parking, the degree of stress cracks was exacerbated.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: T/D Gauge

D2_PROBLEM: Dirty tires ( dirty and no foil in the truck) issued by Conti Lemmerz Portugal. Totally full shipment sorted 947 EA.
D0_EMERGENCY: Hungary SCM sent foil.
D4_SMMY:
Dirty tire (The surface of tire tread is covered in dirt&dust)
why?
3LP rolled  tires on a dirty floor when they loaded it onto the truck and it got dirt at tread surface.
why?
3PL don't know manual or process of OE tire OUT.(&storage)
why?
Madrid 3PL (code 36R0) is for RE tire 3PL. they are not educated/guided for OE tire.
why?
There is no OE 3PL RDC in Spain/Portugal and Hungary plant send tire to VW Portugal directly to Conti.(Monting company) (DFC : direct full container)
There was big OE supply shortage and VW line stop in 2024 2Q. at that time, C level decided to use Madrid RE W/H for VW Portugal OE safety stock.(around 5,000pcs)
why?
To prevent another OE shortage/line stop until It's EOP 2025 August.
D8_RESULT: Hungary SCM sending parts ( foil & OE shipping guideline in English) than education implementation about the OE delivery.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: Madrid 3PL (code 36R0) is for RE tire 3PL. they are not educated/guided for OE tire.
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: It's needed until EOP (25.08) to prevent another OE shortage/line stop. There is no OE 3PL RDC in Spain/Portugal and Hungary plant send tire to VW Portugal directly to Conti.(Monting company) (DFC : direct full container)

D2_PROBLEM: Dirty tires ( dirty and no foil in the truck) issued by Conti Lemmerz Portugal. Totally full shipment sorted 947 EA.
D0_EMERGENCY: Hungary SCM sent foil.
D4_SMMY:
Dirty tire (The surface of tire tread is covered in dirt&dust)
why?
3LP rolled  tires on a dirty floor when they loaded it onto the truck and it got dirt at tread surface.
why?
3PL don't know manual or process of OE tire OUT.(&storage)
why?
Madrid 3PL (code 36R0) is for RE tire 3PL. they are not educated/guided for OE tire.
why?
There is no OE 3PL RDC in Spain/Portugal and Hungary plant send tire to VW Portugal directly to Conti.(Monting company) (DFC : direct full container)
There was big OE supply shortage and VW line stop in 2024 2Q. at that time, C level decided to use Madrid RE W/H for VW Portugal OE safety stock.(around 5,000pcs)
why?
To prevent another OE shortage/line stop until It's EOP 2025 August.
D8_RESULT: Hungary SCM sending parts ( foil & OE shipping guideline in English) than education implementation about the OE delivery.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: 3LP rolled  tires on a dirty floor when they loaded it onto the truck and it got dirt at tread surface.
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: Cover foil on the dirty floor for OE loadings. (buy foil)

FTEV Fuwei Assy' plant complained that a reverse marking occurred on the 225/50R18V H318 (1030192), with the normal red and yellow markings  hitting the DOT side, while the corresponding dot was hitting the barcode side.

驻厂员把打反的点擦拭掉，重新在DOT侧补点，轮胎被重新使用了。

设备故障 ，修复后员工未确认翻转装置上的轮胎 ，导致反打点发生。
Equipment malfunction, after repair, the employee did not confirm the tire on the flipping device, resulting in a reverse marking.
根本原因改善措施：设备程序增加翻转位置轮胎确认提醒
Root cause improvement measures: Equipment program adds tire confirmation reminder for flipping position

D2_PROBLEM:
Tire serial barcode makes noise when it contacts the wheel during low speed driving.

<HK Observation>
1) Sound seems to be periodic in nature
2) If it is related to the barcode, the most likely condition to produce a sound would probably be when the tire is loaded at barcode location
3) Similar phenomenon can be observed with other tire suppliers
D0_EMERGENCY:
TP secured the assembled return tires(3EA) and check the apperance and conduct  Flunger tests.

1) No noise observed during loading, even at barcode location, but further analysis may be required (e.g. test rolling condition instead of static loading).

2) TP left the tires mounted in the condition they were received but could dismount to examine bead area and rim flange in more detail if desired.

3) TP can ship assemblies to Korea R&D for additional noise testing if requested.
D4_SMMY:
Based on the vehicle and noiseless room test results, it is determined that the cause of the accident is not 
 a problem with the tire barcode, but a deviation in assemblability between the tire and the rim
D8_RESULT: Tesla has not replied during 2 weeks after we sent the analysis report. Therefore, we close this issue for now but will follow up this issue if Tesla get us back their opinion.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: barcode position could be the casue of the noise
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: Position of the barcode could be changed if OE make us to do it.

D2_PROBLEM:
胎侧表面起皮
Tire sidewall surface peeling.
D0_EMERGENCY:
1.已经安排人员去Ford工厂及装胎厂sorting。
Personnel have been arranged to sort at Ford factory and tire assembly plant.
2.与Changan Ford STA保持沟通。
Maintain communication with Changan Ford STA.
D4_SMMY:
起皮物质是修饰液，该物质为常规使用且经过验证，对轮胎性能无影响。
发生原因为喷涂量过多造成
D8_RESULT:
1.修饰液涂抹轮胎禁止发送长安F0RD，在库品中的修饰液使用轮胎挑出隔离;对于色差发生轮胎 转零售市场使用。
It is prohibited to send Changan F0RD when applying modification solution to tires. The modification solution in the inventory should be isolated by picking it out from the tires; For tires with color difference, they will be sold to the retail market for use.
2.对修饰液涂抹作业标准，作业员重新培训 Retrain the operators on the application standards of the modifying solution
3.增加对喷壶压力喷涂压力表-制定合适的气压控制标准。
Increase pressure on spray cans and spray pressure gauges - establish appropriate pressure control standards.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: 1. 再作业后未按修饰液涂抹作业标准执行，喷涂修饰液过量。2.修饰液喷壶压力无法控制，喷涂量不稳定。3.修饰液喷涂3次以上时，容易脱皮。
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: 1.修饰液作业标准再教育进行。2.制定合适的气压标准。3. 修饰液配方优化

BYD SQE Feedback There is an abnormality in rear tire wear on the aftermarket
Size：265/45R20 104V K127E  CY（1034382）
Vehicle：BYD Song L
Vehicle Drive: Rear Drive
Mileage:9957Km
D0_EMERGENCY: OE Tech. service team to the 4S store to judge
D4_SMMY:
1.轮胎制造信息追溯无问题
1. After the manufacturing information retroactively, there is no problem
2.与BYD沟通后，BYD内部调查分析，车辆行驶过程有多起地板油烧胎操作，同时轮胎表面有烧胎现象，且花纹沟嵌有碎石，综合分析为车辆行驶原因导致
2.After communication with BYD, BYD internal investigation and analysis, the vehicle driving process has many fierce driving, and the tire surface has a tire burning phenomenon, and the pattern groove is embedded with gravel，so it is not  tire problem.
D8_RESULT:
与BYD沟通后，BYD内部调查分析，车辆行驶过程有多起地板油烧胎操作，同时轮胎表面有烧胎现象，且花纹沟嵌有碎石，综合分析为车辆行驶原因导致，
After communication with BYD, BYD internal investigation and analysis, the vehicle driving process has many fierce driving, and the tire surface has a tire burning phenomenon, and the pattern groove is embedded with gravel，so it is not  tire problem,
CTC 提供了 与开发磨耗差异分析，已获得认可
CTC provides an analysis of wear differences from development and has been agreed by BYD
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: Trace the result of BT inspection，MH&T50 are satisfied.

D2_PROBLEM:
一汽大众4S店新车交付顾客做PDI时发现4条轮胎开裂
When delivering a new car to a customer at the FAW-VW 4S store for PDI check, it was discovered that four tires were Groove cracked.
车型/Vehicle：Tayron
车辆生产日期/Vehicle production date：2023.06.20
4S店入库日期/4S store storage date：2023.09.19
PDI检查日期/PDI check date：2024.05.05（8Km）
购车日期/Date of purchase：2024.05.06
客户更换日期/Customer replacement date：2024.05.15（146Km）
D0_EMERGENCY: After tire replacement, return to JP analysis.
D4_SMMY: Through analysis of the mechanism of crack formation and vehicle storage environment, it was found that the tire was subjected to a combination of adverse conditions such as high pressure, low temperature in winter, high ozone concentration, and long-term parking, which ultimately led to the occurrence of shoulder groove cracks.
D8_RESULT:
1.Through analysis of the mechanism of crack formation and vehicle storage environment, it was found that the tire was subjected to a combination of adverse conditions such as high pressure, low temperature in winter, high ozone concentration, and long-term parking, which ultimately led to the occurrence of shoulder groove cracks.
2.On June 27th, we provided final analysis report to OE Tech.Team and invited them to submit FAW-VW. OE Technology T was sent to FAW-VW on July 1st, but there has been no feedback so far.
3.FAW-VW requests tire suppliers to provide CTL data, speculating that they may be analyzing G. C issue internally .
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: Tracing the curing curve of the returned tire, no abnormalities were found

D2_PROBLEM:
Ford internally tested Rolling Resistance as a surveilance and found F-150 tire shows high result. 

Target : 6.24 - 7.04 (CDS listed)
Recent Result : 7.13 & 7.13 (Both DOT0424 ▶ NG) 

Previously several data shown NG but HK disputed with Ford as Hankook's result was OK.
D0_EMERGENCY:
Requested relevant teams to analyze. 
Detail information listed on comment.
D4_SMMY:
Hankooktire cannot find the root cause through analyzing. 
However as of Hankooktire to decrease RRc to below, Hankooktire suggested ICA with three items and got approval from Ford.
D8_RESULT:
This issue was complicated & complex issue. 
Eventhough Hankooktire cannot find the root cause and internal test of RRc are all in spec, Ford is pushing Hankooktire to find out root cause. 
Hankooktire found gap larger than 0.6 are outlier and request & got approval from Ford to manage this size degrading or shifting 0.4 lower. 
Gap between Hankooktire & Ford need to be checked.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: By analyzing, sidewall width was slightly higher comparing issued(2223, 2923) with normal(4422) from Ford (All within Spec)
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: Hankooktire to normalize degrading sidewall width

D2_PROBLEM:
北汽新能源 投诉我司轮胎表面发生色差，要求轮胎返回替换处理
BAIC complained of color difference on the surface of our tires and asked for tire replacement treatment.
D0_EMERGENCY:
1.轮胎拆卸后返回工厂确认实施
1. After tire removal, return to the factory to confirm the implementation
2.出库轮胎外观状态重点确认，异常品保留处理
2. Out-of-stock tire appearance status confirmation, abnormal product retention processing
D4_SMMY: 根据再现试验，该问题为轮胎黑色度修饰液涂抹过多，胎侧受摩擦后修饰液起皮。
D8_RESULT:
根据再现试验，该问题为轮胎外观修饰液涂抹过多，胎侧受摩擦后修饰液起皮。
According to the reproduction test, the problem is that the tire appearance modifier is over-applied, and the modifier is peeled off after friction.
临时改善方案：该修饰液暂停使用
Temporary improvement plan: the modifier is suspended
永久改善方案：①.修饰液配方优化促进；②.再作业人员作业标准再教育；③.修饰液使用喷壶压力再优化，压力可控管理
Permanent improvement plan: 1.Optimization and promotion of formulation of modified liquid; ②.Re-education of re-operating standards for re-operators; ③.Refining fluid using spray kettle pressure re-optimization, pressure control management
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: 工具：修饰液喷壶 喷涂压力无控制，喷涂量掌握不好-60%.
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: 1.喷壶增加压力表.  2.根据评价指定最合适的气压控制标准-6月15日 技术T

D2_PROBLEM: 1 EA tire has found at Conti mounting co. in Portugal. The founded tire marked with out NCF code FBC and shipped out in OE delivery.
D0_EMERGENCY: Review quality and production history
D4_SMMY: The shipping inspector realized the defective tire, registered it, and then placed it in the place designated for this purpose, equipped with a status indicator. This tire was waiting for repair. The daily task of the logistics process is to deliver the tires awaiting repair to the repair process. Unfortunately, this did not happen.
D8_RESULT: At Logistic Area the MR handling and the process of separate ( reworkable, nonconformity etc ) product must be secured in order to prevent NCF ship out to customer. It must be carefully handling. Present process could be contained human error when handling MR products.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: The logistics worker accidentally placed the wrong tire in the truck.
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: Notice to keep more attention on the reworkable tires and educate all operators on the Logistic part.

1. 르노코리아 품질 담당(이도용책임) 유선으로 식출 현상 및 조치 설명(MP제품 5월말 공급 종료로 현재 생산 없음)
    발생시점(5월7일) 이도용책임 => 차량품질보증팀에 식출(발생)  제거시 문제 없음 회신 완료
    : 식출 제거후 정상적으로 수출PDI장으로 이동 완료
2. 추가 재발생 방지를 위하여 조립공정(타이어서열장) 및 마운티 창고 재고 검사 요청 : 이도용책임
   1)마운틴 창고 재고 수량 : 약 5,000EA
   2)인라인 조립 공정 타이어 서열장 재고 수량 : 약500~800EA/일 공급수량
3. 인라인 및 창고 방문 : 5월8일(수)
   1)마운틴 창고 :  이준님
   2)인라인 조립공정 타이어 서열장 : 전대식님
4. 기타 : 5월8일(수) 재검사결과 이도용책임(개선 대책요청시 제출 예정) 공유 예정

●인라인 및 마운틴 창고 방문 및 재검사(5월8일) : 이준,전대식
인라인 : 검사_1000ea , 발생_38ea(제거완료)
마운틴 창고 (총 재고 약3500ea) : 검사_1050ea , 발생_48ea(제거완료)
Total : 검사_2050ea , 발생_86ea(제가완료)
LOT : DOT 32~37주  , Mold는 20P57에서만 발생 
※마운틴 잔여재고 약2450ea는  5/13~14 재검사 예정
상기 조치 현황 르노코라아 이도용책임 공유 완료
D4_SMMY: T/D 섹터 및 S/W 몰드 조립시 단차발생 예상
D8_RESULT:
1.발생일자 : 5월7일(화) 
2.발생장소 : 르노코리아 부산 공장 완성차 Audit 검사장(LJL차종) 차량 장착 외측 식출 미제거 지적 및 전산 등록됨(차량품질보증팀)
3.발생현상 : Tread 접합부 Burr(식출 : 크기 3mm이상) 발생
4.발생수량 : 1ea ( DOT  3523) ※ Barcode는 식출 제거후 정상 사용으로 실물 미확인(부품품질팀 이도용책임 전산등록 처리 완료)
5. 기타 : 
   1)MP제품 공급 완료(5월말 )예정으로  헝가리공장 생산 없어 이슈 내역 조치 불가로 르노 마운틴 창고 보류 수량 전수 검사만 진행(부품품질팀 담당 공유)
   2)5월8일기준(총 재고 약4500ea) 재검사 완료.  5/8~5/24 재검사실시 ,  식출 발생 수량 : 121ea(2%)_제거완료
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: The visual inspector did not send the tire to the repair process.
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: OPL about the standard (OF).

D2_PROBLEM: Gundlach claimed 1029113/1029114 tires with sidewall visual nonconformance LS / DM.
D0_EMERGENCY: Stock review / quality & production history.
D4_SMMY: Minor chalk repairs were approved by visual and shipping inspectors.
D8_RESULT: Light Sidewall & Dirty Mold NCF product shipped out to customer. Visual inspector must focus to realize NCF and in generally announce DM, LS to PMT, Curing, and related teams need to carefully clean the mold ( PMT) or improve size ( Technology) if required. Both process are important factors in these ncf-s. Visual NCF , reworked product should not be shipped to customer only if factory get approval from them.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: Tires with minor LS and DM defects were allowed to be repaired with chalk.
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: We asked the visual and shipping inspectors to pay more attention. OPL about the LT and DM nonconformity.

D2_PROBLEM: Two tires had  patterns block damage.
D0_EMERGENCY: In HP,From mixing to outbound check
D4_SMMY: This issue is similar to QI-2024-00009,it seems to be caused by external force.
D8_RESULT: The cause of the issue does not occur in HP.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: Damage may occurs when the forklift is used to move the tire.

D2_PROBLEM: UK mounting (Howard Tenens Logistic) recognized tires ship to UK from MP with not proper TD color line ( MTM) nonconformity.
D0_EMERGENCY: Stock review, Quality & Production history
D4_SMMY:
That was a LOT nonconformity. QC holded the affected GT's.
Non-conforming GT's were sent to the curing process. Visual inspectors did not register all tires with an MTM defect. Shipping inspectors did not detect all defective tires.
D8_RESULT: This issue is come from LOT nonconformity. Process of LOT NCF handling were not perfectly secured W/H stock not exactly holded only GMES barcode hold with comment : " For RE market OK" even if manufacturing site did not detect MTM against to checkpoints and fill out worksheet "OK" ( Extruding). Building , Curing missed to realize MTM and Visual inspectors also missed to realized each MTM on both inspection gate. Quality control team when LOT NCF occures it must be hold in the warehouse exactly. Each site which belongs to this MTM shipping out it must be improved.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: The visual and shipping inspectors did not detect the non-conforming tires and they were shipped out.
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: IT modified the G.MES. Tires reworked with an MTM defect must be graded "R" at the UF MBR (before uniformity check) and grade 2NV at the Logistic MBR. A tire reworked with an MTM defect can only be an RE tire.

D2_PROBLEM: 현대차 아산공장 완성차 인라인 조립장 마운터 조립후 공기압 주입후  소음동반 타이어 파열

현대 아산공장의 서열공급처인 하나 물류사 서열대기품 128개 전수 재검 실시중 1개 추가 발생함
완성차 발생 1개, 서열대기품 1개 총:2개 발견되어 이슈품 전량 회수 조치 완료함
D4_SMMY:
LEB 부적합 발생품 유출
(LEB 최초 발생후 브라다 교체전까지 6본 생산되었으며, 4본 부적합 처리됨(3본 스크랩 , 1본 양시))
D8_RESULT:
현대차 아산공장 최초 발생 (완성차 타이어 서브장) 보전 담당자 별도 격리후 특이점 발견하여 즉시 1:1 교환 반출 완료후
현대차 아산공장의 서열 공급처 하나 물류사 대기품 192EA 전수 검사 실시후 1EA  발견되어 (총2개) 이슈품 회수 송부 완료함
 
LEB 발생시 검사자 인지 시점부터 6개 발생 :부적합 공장발견(4개) 외부 유출 발견:(2개)  발견되어 추가 이슈 사항 없을것으로 판단됨

상황 전달 즉시 공장 대처가 빠른점 다시 한번 감사 드리며, 향후 동일 이슈 발생 없도록 유관 부서 소통바랍니다
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: LEB 부적합 발생품 유출
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: 외관검사 관리 강화

D2_PROBLEM: Some portion of the dot is being faint where letters carved on.
D0_EMERGENCY: Share this issue to QA team and request a test to adjust the position of red dot and checking the pin, pressure and temperature of marking system
D4_SMMY:
널링(미세널링) 부 Red dot 미 마킹, Tesla 비전 장치 내 미 인식
마킹 품도 향상을 위한 재작업용 Tape 사용 가능여부 평가진행
  - 해상운송 시 컨테이너 환경 모사를 위한 노화챔버(65 deg) 10일 방치 평가 결과 널링부 재작업용 Tape 지워짐, 민무니부 부착 시 안지워짐
    --> 사용 불가 판단
  - Ford 재마킹용 펜
    --> 평가 결과 이상 무
  - 추가적으로 스티커 type Red dot 제안함
D8_RESULT:
Red Dot vision reading Test with Binglish has passed at Halla's vision system in Fremont CA. (1pcs)
Now we are trying to arrange line trial with 20 pcs applied Binglish Red Dot. So, the test result will be added in this section.(Tires are shipping from KP on 5th June.)
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: 널링(미세널링) 부 Red dot 미 마킹, Tesla 비전 장치 내 미 인식
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: Ford 재마킹용 펜 사용 (스티커 type 제안)

D2_PROBLEM: 中国济宁市 顾客行驶4580多公里后，发现高速抖动，4S店检查确认右侧前后轮平衡后仍发生，拆胎发现海绵脱落，邀请返回分析중 지닝시 고객 4580여km 주행 후 고속 떨림 발견, 4S점 우측 앞뒷바퀴 밸런스 확인 후에도 발생, 타이어 제거시 스폰지 떨어져 분석 요청
D0_EMERGENCY: 轮胎返回工厂分析，技术服务T后续处理。 타이어는 분석을 위해 공장으로 돌아가고 기술 서비스 T는 후속 처리됩니다.
D4_SMMY: 制造过程追溯OK
D8_RESULT:
a.从 返回胎 静音棉 脱落 样像 以及 生产过程追溯 结果来看，静音棉 贴附 作业 过程 无异常
a.From the surface of Foam of return tire and the  traceability of the production process, there is no abnormality in the process 
b. 从静音棉&胶水入库追溯及静音棉返回后强度分析来看，静音棉及胶水的性能均满足要求
b.According to the income checksheet of Foam/Glue and inspection of Foam of return tire， meet the requiement. 
c.返回胎 静音棉 表面 存在 明显 损伤，且对应轮胎外表面也存在损伤，本次静音棉脱落可能为外力损伤（如路面台阶等） 导致静音棉局部损伤，引起局部撕裂脱离，经过长期行驶下，逐步导致静音棉整体脱落发生
c.Check the surface of return tire Foam，the surface of Foam is obviously damaged, and the outer surface of the corresponding tire is also damaged.  
    So the Foam seprate from tire may be damaged by external force (such as road steps).
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: 从静音棉&胶水入库追溯及静音棉返回后强度分析来看，静音棉及胶水的性能均满足要求

D8_RESULT:
a.从 返回胎 静音棉 脱落 样像 以及 生产过程追溯 结果来看，静音棉 贴附 作业 过程 无异常
a.From the surface of Foam of return tire and the  traceability of the production process, there is no abnormality in the process 
b. 从静音棉&胶水入库追溯及静音棉返回后强度分析来看，静音棉及胶水的性能均满足要求
b.According to the income checksheet of Foam/Glue and inspection of Foam of return tire， meet the requiement. 
c.返回胎 静音棉 表面 存在 明显 损伤，且对应轮胎外表面也存在损伤，本次静音棉脱落可能为外力损伤（如路面台阶等） 导致静音棉局部损伤，引起局部撕裂脱离，经过长期行驶下，逐步导致静音棉整体脱落发生
c.Check the surface of return tire Foam，the surface of Foam is obviously damaged, and the outer surface of the corresponding tire is also damaged.  
    So the Foam seprate from tire may be damaged by external force (such as road steps).

D2_PROBLEM: Totally 35 EA tires sent to Continental Portugal with Uniformity issues, some of them rework due to RFV and some of them sent as 7 grade  and or get OE grade after 9 times inspection.
D0_EMERGENCY: Check shipment, stock, production and quality history.
D4_SMMY: Tires with different grades were mixed during the shipment.
D8_RESULT: After picked up tires which ready for shipment remained tires loading back to warehouse ( with possible human error ) manually. This manual work caused that "RE" grade tire could be loaded back as "OE" if tires are mixed on pallet and operator can OE tire whenever send back. This case the whole tires on pallet become OE status as the pallet too.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: The inspector ignored the scanner signal.
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: Development: the scanner indicates the grade of the tire. The inspector can make a quick decision.

D2_PROBLEM: VW size sent to Continental Portugal totally 7 EA with visual nonconformity and the place of NCF marked with white chalk. But in the system these are not registered NCF tires at the visual inspection. This shipment OE grade tires.
D0_EMERGENCY: Check the shipment and stock, quality and production history.
D4_SMMY: Minor chalk repairs were approved by visual and shipping inspectors.
D8_RESULT: Light Sidewall & Dirty Mold NCF product shipped out to customer. Visual inspector must focus to realize NCF and in generally announce DM, LS to PMT, Curing, and related teams need to carefully clean the mold ( PMT) or improve size ( Technology) if required. Both process are important factors in these ncf-s. Visual NCF , reworked product should not be shipped to customer only if factory get approval from them.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: Tires with minor LS and DM defects were allowed to be repaired with chalk.
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: We asked the visual and shipping inspectors to pay more attention. OPL about the LT and DM nonconformity.

D2_PROBLEM: Uniformity marking color not matching with specification. Spec is RED the Actual is White.
D0_EMERGENCY: Check production history and warehouse stock. Shipping inspection for the Nissan.
D4_SMMY: U/F markings were often incomplete. The corrected markings were blurred because there was not enough drying time.
D8_RESULT: Even if U/F marking is only a visual point and the product quality is in safe the customer requirement must be fullfilled , proper quality of marking, proper color of marking must be secured.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: After change of size, the marking was not checked.
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: Using new marking tape. Temperature, pin control. Position setting. Marking check by shift. In the event of a size change, the machine stop - program modification stops.

FMPL tire found in Anyi warehouse, and this tire found by JP) QA members during checking around the warehouse. (Not noticed to the customers.)

2. 성형, 가류 공정 중 플라스틱의 일부분이 반제품 및 Green Tire에 붙어 가류된 것으로 추정
 - 전 공정 중 관련 우레탄 계열 폴리머 확인하였으나 유사 제품 발견 안됨
D8_RESULT:
Foreign Material was not defined clearly but a piece of bead separator is suspected with naked eye in this case.
The chemical property analysis result will be uploaded when it is done by MEP.
KP will do 5S weekly at building and curing process with the request of QC team.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: G/T 상측에 이물이 뭍어 가류된 것으로 추정
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: Tesla Model3 사전 검사 프로세스 도입 (출하 검사전 추가 검사)

D2_PROBLEM:
According to complain from the FAW-VW Tianjin plant, during the internal audit of Audi Q3 PA 235/50R19V K127A (1029773), it was found that the shoulders of two front tires  were abnormal, the tread was peeling.DOT is 5123.
This vehicle had traveled 8.7km, which was considered normal offline, have undergone routine road tests .
D0_EMERGENCY:
1.Arrange on-site confirmation by resident personnel.
2.The tire has not been disassembled yet. FAW-VW requires traceability of the manufacturing process of 51W and whether there are any abnormalities.
3.Provide feedback on the  items and cycle that need to be analyzed after the tire is returned.
4.Resident staff  in-line inspection to check if there is a similar issue.
D4_SMMY: 制造过程追溯正常
D8_RESULT:
The shoulder of this tire has severe wear marks, indicating that it has undergone extreme driving.
Under normal driving conditions, only the tread of the tire comes into contact with the ground, and only in extreme driving situations will the sidewall of the tire come into contact with the ground.
Under extreme driving conditions, the torque borne by the tires will also be very concentrated, causing rubber wear and peeling in the middle of the tread.
According to the design requirements, the tread is made of ultra-high grip composite material, and it is normal for this appearance to wear under extreme conditions.
The production process of the two returned tires was traced and no abnormalities were found. The appearance, cross-sectional structure, and physical properties were not found to be abnormal.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: 硫化时间、温度、压力
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: OK

D2_PROBLEM: 강릉 지역 Field EC 성 사이드월 Separation 발생
D0_EMERGENCY:
1. 고객 대응 : 동일 사이즈 AH51 신규 패턴으로 교체
2. 내부 전개
  (1) 금산QA팀 : 해당 규격 전량 출하 보류 및 창고 재검 요청
  (2) 금산물류Sub팀 : 해당 규격 출하 이력('23년 1월 ~ 현재까지) 확인 요청
  (3) KP)품질관리팀 : 해당 규격 바코드 추적 및 EC 발생 가능 LOT 한정 요청
D4_SMMY:
1. G/T 중량 ± 3% 이내(`23년 4/5, 4/8일)이나, 전체적으로 중량이 " - 경향 "으로 EC 에 불리하게 작용함.
     Tread Ga.가 빠졌을 것으로 추정됨 (압출물 확인결과 Profile 미측정으로 당시 상태 확인 불가)
2. 고품의 경우 PA Joint 부위 부분적으로 발생으로 보아, Tread Ga. 빠지면서, 특히 PA Joint 관리(Butt)가 일부 안되면서 발생된 것으로 판단됨.
D8_RESULT: 지속적인 중량관리 및 PA Joint 관리가 필요 할 것으로 판단됨
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: PA Joint 관리 미흡 (Butt)
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: PA Joint 관리 작업지침서 배포/교육, G/T 인너부 외관검사 강화 (PA Joint부 성형 작업자)

D2_PROBLEM: FAW-VW(Foshan plant) discovered a expired tire with a DOT of 2123 on the Audi Q2L , requesting improvement and prevention measures.
D0_EMERGENCY:
1.Issue tire DOT is 2123，Permissible tire DOT is 2623，so this tire was used beyond its expiration date.
2.FAW-VW(Foshan plant) DOT requirement is within 36week.
3.The delivery date of this tire is Oct 22, 2023, and it was not overdue at that time.
4.Third party warehouse storage overdue.
D4_SMMY:
1)  The tire was delivered by Oct.22 2024, and it was not overdue according to the DOT requiremant, but the detail of the DOT  didn't show on the delivery list.
2)  The reason for this  is that the 3PL do not checking the tire DOT well when they sent to the assembly plant. 
3)  Meanwhile the assembly plant as the final inspection also didn't catch the problem in time.
D8_RESULT: The plant conducts DOT isolation shipment and indicates the quantity of each DOT on the order. Zhenbang Logistics distinguishes storage based on this information and follows the principle of FIFO, and ships to the assembly plant.
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: Mark the specific DOT and quantity clearly.

D2_PROBLEM:
Full dot 방향 side부  Assembly Air Leak 접수되어 해체후 Inner(내부) 카카스코드지에 의한 관통 손상  Air Leak 확인

이정도면  타이어 공기압 전량 소실되어   차량이 주져 앉아 행거 분리가 어려울  가능성 매우 높으나  라인 정지 없는게 다행으로 보여짐
박이수책임~원인분석 개선대책서 제출 내사 방문 설명 요구함
D0_EMERGENCY: 어셈블리 조립상태에서 사이드월부 비눗물 도포 100개 확인 점검 실시 추가  발견 없었음
D4_SMMY:
1. 발생현상 : 타이어 내부 Steel Wire 돌출로 인너 관통 Air누기 (고품 X-Ray 확인결과  Wire 가닥 이물입 확인, Topping물에서 발생은 안됨)
2. 발생원인
 1) 트러블 발생 Cutting시 Wire 변형 및 이탈 가능성 有
 2) 2Belt 이탈 Wire가 1Belt로 유입 가능성 有
 3) 1Belt 유입된 상태에서 작업
 4) 2차 Turn Up후 1차+2차 Ass'y시 유입된 Wire가 싸이드월~트래드 사이에 들어가서 부착된 것으로 판단
3. 개선내용 : 2Belt Cutting기 하단 철판 설치 (하단 1Belt Wire 이물 유입 근본 차단)
D8_RESULT:
박이수책임 개선 대책서 제출및 설명 대응으로 종결처리 완료함
박이수책임의견: 부적합 발생시 원인분석하여 근본 대책수립이 필요하며 임시 대책으로 생산 대기품에 대한 품질 확보 방안에 대환 대책이 
                              더욱더 중요하다는 의견 임
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: 2Belt 이탈 Wire 1가닥 1Belt 하단부로 유입
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: 2Belt Cutting기 하단 설판 설치로 하단 1Belt Wire 이물 유입 차단

D2_PROBLEM: Missing DOT Code found at the Honda Indiana plant
D0_EMERGENCY:
Requested the barcode information (mounted wheel and tire) to check the manufacturing history
Also, requested to ship it back to TP
D4_SMMY:
1. Why made 
    - Occurs when an operator with low skill is unable to insert DOT accurately (High probability)
2. Why shipped
     1) Visual inspectors did not identify 100% of issue tires
     2) Not all tires within the range were contained
D8_RESULT:
1. Why made : Occurs when an operator with low skill is unable to insert DOT plate accurately
2. Why shipped  : Visual and shipping inspectors did not identify 100% of issue tires – lack of attention/awareness
3. Countermeasure : Verified the machine stop and +/- 5 barcodes held when registering nonconformity
 -> We are continuing discussions with Honda to stop sorting.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: visual and shipping inspector missed
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: Strengthen visual inspection ability with additional training and Improvements to hold system to prevent containment issues

D2_PROBLEM: Damaged part at the decoration line identified by Glovis Co. and claimed tire to HK. Damaged area looks caused by Foreign Material nonconfomity.
D0_EMERGENCY: Check the current stock & shipment. Further manufacturing investigation could start when tire arrive to HK Hungary Plant.
D4_SMMY: Previously FM KIA was coating material. At his moment based on FT-IR spectrum is not coating material. Along the production line make FM risk review by QC team and collect FM possible sample than make FT-IR comparism. Specturm show possible sealing O ring identified but during Facility, machinery investigation and history review did not find clear evidence. That's why strongly make education to  QA inspectors in order to prevent shipping out FM NCF tires.
D8_RESULT: Quality Control Team analyzed sample taken from claim tire. Identified as O -ring ( sealing) but even if trace back production line could not find exactly where the Sealing ring felt in tire production. So risky place shall keep under check by Quality Control team as Quality Risk item and 100 % visual inspection should catch this ( and similar big, visible) nonconformity at least shipping inspection or visual inspection after curing process. With 2 inspection gate should not be given a chance to ship out easily detectable visual NCF tire to customer. All the employee ( QA visual&ship inspector) did get educations.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: Visual inspector & shipping inspector did not realized a really visible FM even if keep standard inspection time.
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: Notice to keep more attention on the FM and educate all inspector on the QA part.

D2_PROBLEM: During the first inspection after curing, it was found that the mold 23K67 bearing ring on the left side of Curing machine K3506 did not match the SPEC.
D0_EMERGENCY:
1. Invite Project T&D. QA&CTC to add a process for confirming mold drawings during the development process to prevent recurrence. Verify and determine the tires with incorrect bearing ring and report to the factory on how to handle them.
2. Mold modification for Bead ring error, planned to be completed on Mar 4th.
3.The factory distinguishes the tires that have already been produced based on whether the bearing ring is correct and stores them separately

1. Implement according to DQA improvement measures
2. The wrong tire is supplied to the OEM normally
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: Approved spec mold drawings cannot be indicated on HighCAD system
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: Set work process and both HighCAD and PLM about "Approved drawing" indication.

D2_PROBLEM:
비대칭 패턴으로 물류 기사님 4단 타이어 적재시 IN-SIDE 상측 적재 TIRE&WHEE Ass'y 조립됨
IN-SIDE 상면 조립 마킹포인트 /스티커 없음
OUT-SIDE 하면 조립 마킹포인트 스티커  있
D0_EMERGENCY: 완성차 인라인 입고품 60개 검사 완료 추가 발생 없음
D4_SMMY:
SYMC 역적재 관련 현장 확인 요청
  
 - SYMC는 역적재 ISSUE 발생에 대한 가능성을 없애기 위해 전담차량 배차, 전담차량 휴차 시 SYMC 전담 경험이 있는 차량을 배차 하고 있음.
   10년 이상의 경험을 가지고 있는 차량기사가가 전담을 하도록 특별 배차관리를 하고 있음에도 역적재 ISSUE가 발생하여 차량기사 교육하던 중 
   최초 차량기사의 하차를 제외한 Tire가 재적재 되는 경우(역적재 가능성)가 있는지 파악하여 아래와 같이 두 가지 상황을 인지하였음.

  차량기사 하차 작업 시 U/F마킹 역적재 되는 경우도 있지만, 최초 하차 이후 Line에 들어가기 까지 Tire가 차량기사의 손만 타는 것이 아님.
  Ex) 1. 상주원 재고 파악 할 시 Tire Pallet 이탈 하여  재적재 하는 경우 있음.(낱본정리 등)
         2. Tire Line 투입 시 작업 대상 Item이 아닌,  다른 Item이 투입될 경우 Line오투입을 막기 위해 SYMC 현장 작업자가 적재된 Tire를 쏟아 현장에서 재적재 하는 경우 있음.  

이에 대한 확인 요청드리며,  역적재 ISSUE가 매번 발생하지 않는 것 처럼 
Car Maker 안에서의 재적재 가능성 여부 또한 조사 진행 시 1회성으로는 재적재에 대한 여부파악이 어려울 것으로 예상되어
지속적인 관찰이 필요합니다.
D8_RESULT:
본건 관련하여 완성차 작업인원/상주원 재고 파악과정에서 타이어 레인을  옮기면서 발생할 수 있는 사례 배제 할 수 없으나 극히 제한적인 부분이라고 사료됩니다.
타이어 뒤집어 적재시 상주원/본인 지속적 모니터링 진행 토록하겠습니다.

요청사항~
                 경기권 HMC 아산공장 /기아차 화성1.2.3공장 /KMC서산공장/ KMC광명공장 /KGM 평택공장 비대칭 패턴 tread 색선을 한쪽 방향으로 치우치게 페어 관리하고 있습니다
                타이어를  4단 적재 투입중 뒤집혀 적재될 경우 색선이 좁아져 보이는 현상이 발생되어 물류기사님 외관상 확인 될 수 있도록  눈으로 보는 관리를 하고 있습니다.
               
               해당공장 물류팀에서 비대칭 패턴 색선관리 방법 교육 당부 드립니다.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: Tire 하차 중 U/F마킹 상측 적재 확인 미흡으로 인한 역적재 발생
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: 차량 상차작업 시 U/F마킹 상측 6시 방향(차량기사 하차시 타이어 잡는 부분)에 통일시켜 상차하여 차량기사의 U/F마킹 식별을 용이하게 하여 역적재 방지

D2_PROBLEM: The shoulder of the tire is abnormal and lacks rubber. Currently waiting for the tire to return.
D0_EMERGENCY:
1. Location: Chang an Ford 2nd Line.

3. Changan Ford chassis engineer sends an email to CP QA T to issue QCM（Containment Tracking  sheet）.
4.On Apr. 19th, CP QA T arranged personnel to go to the tire assembly plant for sorting. Total sorting quantity 192EA, and the result is OK. No identical issues were found.
5. There are 1832 EA being sorted by CP in stock, and the result is OK. No identical issues were found.

D4_SMMY: 根据返回轮胎外观状态和制造过程追踪分析，确定为外物剐蹭造成损伤
D8_RESULT:
Based on the appearance status of the returned tire and tracking analysis of the manufacturing process, it is determined that the damage was caused by external object scratches.
1. Rectify the container with sharp screws before use.
2. Set the container  inspection process
① The internal inspection of the container has been changed from random inspection to 100% inspection;
② Clarify the team of inspection and implementation responsibilities: the logistics team inspects, and the QA team supervises the implementation.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: 对轮胎运输车辆进行检查发现箱体内壁有尖锐螺丝，推断为运输中该尖锐螺丝导致轮胎损伤。
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: 1.对已经发现内壁有螺丝的车箱整改，螺丝进行打磨。2.集装箱内部状体检查从抽检改为全检，并重点检查毛刺/钉子等类似容易导致轮胎损伤的。

D4_SMMY: 成型1#BELT接头切割时钢丝拉出，拉出的钢丝横向粘着在BELT上做成G/T导致.
D8_RESULT:
Rootcause: 【Building】When the BELT joint is cut, the steel cord is pulled out, and the pulled steel cord is stuck horizontally on the BELT, and G/T is made.
Countermeasure:  1.Confirm the cutting state of the cutter and clean the adhesive. Confirm and clean twice/shift backward. 
                                       2. Cutter evaluation: Once every two weeks, N/G halt and altenation.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: 1.1#BELT切割后一根钢丝被拉出，期间无设备故障停机.
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: 1.成型BELT割刀切割状态确认、粘胶清理，向后2次/班确认、清理.   2.割刀评价：1次/2周评价，NG停机交替.

D2_PROBLEM: Bulge detected by the assembly when inflating the tire.
D0_EMERGENCY:
1. checked the manufacturing history and UF measurement result
2. checked the suspected tires in warehouse
D4_SMMY: Deformed tire occurred due to irregular overlap of the carcass joint
D8_RESULT:
1) Why made
   - Deformed tires occurred due to irregular overlap of the carcass joint	
2) Why ship
    - Visual inspector did not identify the nonconformity	
3) Corrective/Preventive Action :
    - Step height was increased to prevent insufficient overlap)	
    - Back pusher was optimized to control the back speed of the carcass
    - Strengthen visual inspection ability with additional training
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: BPS did not detect the bulge correctly
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: Upgrading 2D BPS (HQ visitig at plant for diagnosis and set-up the upgraded BPS measuring system)

D2_PROBLEM: Found wire/steel coming out from inside shoulder of tire when checking the appearance of tire during the vehicle's one year inspection (No Air Leaks)

D4_SMMY: Steel Coming Out caused by Nonconformity BED (Belt Edge Disorder).
D8_RESULT:
Root Casue : 
-. Foreign Material detecting is Foreign Material Iron (FMI). Material Iron is come from Steel Cord → Steel Cord is come from Building Process Area.
Permanent Corrective Action:
1. Conduct Re-education to final shipping and visual inspector related Quality issue and take more attention to check at Sidewall & Shoulder area. 
2. Re-education with purpose to strengthen our control for visual and shipping inspection before delivery the tire.
3. Quality Control Team conduct FM Patrol in Manufacturing Process (Building) to prevent Foreign Material Iron occurred in the tire.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: It can be caused by Belt Cutter Knife is dull or when manual joint belt condition is not good.
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: Repair Belt Cutter Knife and when rejoint manual have to make sure that cutting belt is good condition

D2_PROBLEM: On 24th November. Spain Mounting plant reported Audi A1 16inch blue color line distance rather large. Barcode:  8113056389
D0_EMERGENCY: QA reinspect all the tires in factory warehouse.
D4_SMMY: Initial production after size alternation, there's discrepancies during initial color line adjustment, 2 white NG/OK distinguishing lines are too short. Rolling OP didn't notice the distinguishing line, the NG part is also rolled into the scroll cart and flowed into the next process and being used.
D8_RESULT:
a.Extruding: During tread sizes alternation adjustment, NG/OK Tread "marking" distance increased, (2 vertical lines→1 meter↑continuous curving lines), to ensure the rolling OP can have sufficient time to identify. Before rolling, turn over the head of NG part in time so it is not used.
 b. Building: Color line distance added&confirmed, to prevent NG parts from curing into tires.
 c. Inspection: The actual color line distance is included in the confirmation items, and sampling confirmation is carried out for each batch exit the warehouse. (2EA/car, 1EA for each head&end.)
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: Initial production after size alternation, there's discrepancies during initial color line adjustment, 2 white NG/OK distinguishing lines are too short. Rolling OP didn't notice the distinguishing line, the NG part is also rolled into the scroll cart and flowed into the next process and being used.
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: During tread sizes alternation adjustment, NG/OK Tread "marking" distance increased, (2 vertical lines→1 meter↑continuous curving lines), to ensure the rolling OP can have sufficient time to identify. Before rolling, turn over the head of NG part in time so it is not used.

D5_COUNTERMEASURE: Program will show the proper color each barcode reading.

1차 긴급 회의 진행 (9/2)

 - 제조이력 포함 원인, 대책 수립 후 재협의 진행 예정

해당 건은 단품성 이슈로 고객 협의 된 사항이며, 추가 선별없이 종결된 사항임.
FM 부적합 지속 발생에 따른 공장 강화 관리 요청하였으며, 지속 추이 확인 필요함.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: 압출 권취부에 케이블 고정용 타이 잔유물 혼입
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: 설비 주변 공사 또는 계획 보전후에 남은 FM 없도록 관리 개선 진행

     - find out that there were no issue before shipping
D4_SMMY:

D8_RESULT: It is a shipping containers management issue, we noticed sales , QA and Logistic team about it, and will keep monitoring if the same issue happens again.

D5_COUNTERMEASURE: Next time if the same issue happens, we will raise the issue and gether everybody to have a meeting  to solve the issue.

Honda HCM에서 비드부 Air leak 이슈 1개 발생 공유

D0_EMERGENCY:
긴급 Honda HCM 및 ELP 회의 진행 (8/2) 
-Honda 요청 의거 GLA (Honda assembly) 소팅 진행 
 -> RDC 창고(ATCO 및 Pival) Clean point 확보 필요 
-타이어어 회수 및 원인 분석 
Next shippment 검사 및 certificate mark 부착 -> RDC (ATCO 및 Pival) 창고와 협의
D4_SMMY:
FMB :  Cured rubber from previous curing cycle is cured into tire
1) Defect is superficial and does not extend into the interior components
2) Issue is not located near any component joins (not on carcass and body ply )
3) The strip on the rim check line is unbroken at the issue location
D8_RESULT:
Root Cause: Foreign object molded into tire during curing process
Corrective Actions:
Implement red rabbit system in inspection to identify gaps in knowledge/ability and provide
coaching
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: visual inspectior did not catch this tire
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: Implement red rabbit system to provide coaching and feedback for missed nonconformities

D2_PROBLEM:
When driving the high temperature place (Arizona), the customer felt vibration and checked the tire found bulge on tread and belt coming out.

Remark : Those tires are fitted on to Winnebago Ekko (Transition model of Transit)
Mileage : 25,000 miles
D0_EMERGENCY:
Tires were arranged to send Korea to analze. 
Checked the weight of vehicle with its' front and rear axile can bear how much of load.
According to data, GAWR of Transit has range of 2,700 ~ 2,802 lbs.
And GAWR of Winnebago Ekko has 4,630lbs. 
As of those GAWR is different, it has to be checked with Ford with analyzing the tire.
D4_SMMY:
It is estimated that Customer have ride Winnebago Ekko (Transit Transformed) with low inflation inserted tires on bad condition of road. 
It is not Hankook's fault.
D8_RESULT:
Considering all, it is concluded that customer ran with vehicle with high load or low inflation pressure on tire.
As DVP was approved to endure the weight of Winnebago Ekko, Hankook did not tell Ford it caused by high load firstly but with no luggage, front tires endure max. 91% at only with its vehicle's weight. 
Hankook recommened Ford to exchange transit tire to CP(Commercial Ply) on Winnebago Ekko.

D2_PROBLEM: Tread paint line was not applied properly
D4_SMMY:
Root cause : Intermittent tread paint application issue
The issue affected only a few tires during the extruding run but the issue was not consecutive.
D8_RESULT:
Corrective actions
1. Retrain extruding operators with OPL abut required customer markings
2. Retrain visula inspectors about using barcode scanner and visual management to check customer required markings
3. Implement periodic red rabbit system to identify gaps in inspector knowledge and ability.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: visual inspector did not catch all tires with missing tread paint line
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: Implemented red rabbit system for visual inspecton process to provide coaching and feedback for missed nonconformities

D2_PROBLEM: Tyres were found at final inspection with color band on the wrong side of the tyre. Color band is should be on the outside / same side of tyre date
D0_EMERGENCY: Current stock review. Production line reviewed. Implemented new stamping method for visual inspection gates.
D4_SMMY: Green tire rotated between the G/T warehouse & Curing lines. Strengthen IG detection in 2 step : Barcode reading before curing line & DOT number detection camera on the inspection process.  Rotation could be done in the w/h conveyor and by carry cages both of phenomenon can be eliminated by the above mentioned improvements. Installation predicted closing date : 10/31 in 2023.
D8_RESULT: IG camera upgrade. Curing BMW signed machine each G/T scanned.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: G/T rotation possibility by carry cage & G/T warehouse.
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: Strengthen detection curing & inspection.

D2_PROBLEM: Screw ( nut) was found in the tyre inside.
D0_EMERGENCY: Current stock reviewed with production line ( nut got into Green tire before curing suspected ) immediately.
D4_SMMY: On the current production machine one screw ( loader horizontal setting nut) became lazy & fell into green tire than cured. Visual inspectors did not detected. All machine checked and change the screws for locking type.
D8_RESULT: Nut coming from the part of Curing machine , all the Nut changed for other type in order to prevent become lazy.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: Loader horizontal setting nut fell out
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: Facility ordered and change for locking type on all machine.

D8_RESULT:

D2_PROBLEM: Visual OF not detected and not handled.
D0_EMERGENCY: Checked size current production status & history. Sorting activity done by Gundlach warehouse. Checked size and related molds ( segments).
D4_SMMY: Overflow could be happened in many cases, for example if the green tire weight is bit more, the curing pressure is higher, the curing temperature is lower, the mold segment gap is outfitt etc... In that kind of failure, we can check the curing datas from the MES system and we can close off the not related events (weight, temperature, pressure, compound). If we closed off all the possible events, the only error could be the mold segment gap is outfitt. After a curing period the mold cleaned time to time and sometimes a not well prepared fitting or cleaning can occure overflow in the next curing period. After all, if the curing machine make an overflow tire, the operators in the rework can and have to remove it. As visible in D3 point, after mold repair in 27th of Janurary this type of nonconformity reduced around 77% in February.
D8_RESULT: Importance of detection visual nonconformity, notice to related teams in order to realize in time and make proper counteraction to prevent release to OE market.  Control nonconformity ( OF) within acceptable pass rate and handling OF tires at the proper time & process.
D4_ROOT_CAUSE: Mold
D5_COUNTERMEASURE: Mold repair
